Mo Hartman

Having the visibility on the dashboard has been extremely helpful and the ease of being able to approve. It is very user-friendly and I can see everything I need in one place.

Setup was easy and payment was seamless. The cost is more than fair. I’m a small business and figuring it out myself was daunting.

I'm glad I made the switch to Kintsugi. Not only am I saving money right now, but I'm also getting better service in terms of accuracy.
Mo Hartman

Having the visibility on the dashboard has been extremely helpful and the ease of being able to approve. It is very user-friendly and I can see everything I need in one place.
Aaron Hallerman

Kintsugi has made handling sales tax so much easier. We used to work with an agency that did everything manually, which left us no clarity on nexus or filing timing. Kintsugi is the modern approach to sales tax and support has been awesome as well.
